sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_data (id UInt64, h3_index UInt64, description String, coords Array(Float64, Float64));
SELECT id, h3_index, h3ToGeoBoundary(h3_index) AS boundary FROM geo_data HAVING h3_index GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT h3_index FROM geo_data WHERE description LIKE '%Boundary%');
SELECT id, h3_index FROM geo_data WHERE h3_index GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT arrayJoin(h3ToGeoBoundary(h3_index)) FROM geo_data WHERE id = 1);
CREATE TABLE geo_test (h3_index UInt64, boundary Array(Float64, Float64));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM geo_test WHERE boundary GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT h3ToGeoBoundary(h3_index) FROM geo_data WHERE coords IS NOT NULL);
WITH (SELECT arrayJoin(boundary) FROM geo_test) AS coords SELECT h3_index FROM geo_test WHERE coords GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT arrayJoin(h3ToGeoBoundary(h3_index)) FROM geo_data);
SELECT h3_index, COUNT(*) FROM geo_data GROUP BY h3_index HAVING h3_index GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT h3_index FROM geo_data WHERE id IS NULL);
CREATE TABLE boundary_test (h3_index UInt64, location String, coords Array(Float64, Float64) DEFAULT h3ToGeoBoundary(h3_index));
UPDATE boundary_test SET coords = h3ToGeoBoundary(h3_index) WHERE h3_index GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT h3_index FROM geo_test);
